creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
xemacs port installs /usr/local/lib/xemacs/lock world-writable.
        This is a religious affront. The correct place (after discussion
        in -ports) is /var/run .

Fix: Patching the port Makefile and pkg/PLIST as follows will have
        xemacs use /var/run/xemacs/lock instead.

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/editors/xemacs ; make install
